description: Address review findings: add dashboard error state, move get_public_url inside try/except in renter_service.py, and wire up pending tasks card.
steps: 1. In DashboardPage.tsx, destructure isError from both useQuery hooks and display an error message when queries fail.
2. In renter_service.py, move the get_public_url call inside the existing try/except block to match the contract_service.py pattern.
3. In DashboardPage.tsx, add a useQuery for tasks (using getTasks with status 'pending') and wire it to the fourth card.
acceptance_criteria: DashboardPage.tsx shows error message 'Khong the tai du lieu' when queries fail
renter_service.py has get_public_url inside the try/except block
Pending tasks card shows live data from tasks API
Backend Python file has no syntax errors
